Index.title: Welcome to Nowruz.wiki
Index.description: Discover the beauty, history, and traditions of the Persian New Year.

History.label: History & Origins
History.title: The Ancient Roots of Nowruz
History.subtitle: Trace the 3,000-year heritage of the Persian New Year — from Zoroastrian rituals to the myth of King Jamshid.

ChaharshanbeS.label: Rituals & Preparation
ChaharshanbeS.title: Chaharshanbe Suri
ChaharshanbeS.subtitle: The Festival of Fire — from 'shaking the house' clean to leaping over roaring bonfires on the last Wednesday before the new year.

Foods.label: Cuisine & Culture
Foods.title: The Cuisine of Spring
Foods.subtitle: Herbed rice, noodle stews, and mountains of sweets — the mouth-watering, deeply symbolic dishes that define Nowruz.

Science.label: Astronomy & Timekeeping
Science.title: The Science of the Equinox
Science.subtitle: Why the Persian New Year starts at a different second every year — the fascinating astrophysics behind Nowruz.

SizdahBedar.label: The 13th Day
SizdahBedar.title: Sizdah Bedar
SizdahBedar.subtitle: The 13-day marathon of celebration, ending with a massive, nationwide nature picnic to wash away bad luck.

Wiki.label: Knowledge Base
Wiki.title: Nowruz Wiki
Wiki.subtitle: Dive deeper into the mythology, history, and culinary traditions of the Persian New Year through our comprehensive encyclopedia.
